title: [WIP] Recurrent MQA Transformer — depth recurrence + weight tying (nidhilak-Aquarius)
author: nidhilak-Aquarius

data.description: One shared TransformerBlock looped 12 times instead of using 9 unique blocks.
Output projection is tied to the embedding matrix to eliminate extra parameters.
Embedding and output projection share weights for zero-parameter output projection.
Multi-Query Attention with 8 query heads and 1 key/value head.
Rotary positional embeddings used to avoid learned positional parameters.
SwiGLU feed-forward network used instead of GELU.
BitNet-style ternary quantization proposed as a Phase 2 extension, constraining weights to {-1, 0, +1} with straight-through estimator training.

novel_contributions: Depth recurrence via a single shared Transformer block looped 12 times
Weight tying / tied embeddings for zero-parameter output projection
Multi-Query Attention with 8 query heads and 1 key/value head
Proposed BitNet ternary quantization phase for further compression
